case_title: CCSF TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR VS. IRENEA NALUS CONCEPCION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CONCEPCION, IRENEA NALUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MARC SEIDENFELD. FILED BY CCSF TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARC SEIDENFELD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE ADAMS--CCSF/TTX.. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARC SEIDENFELD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
